changes: Tauri: native file dialogs, workspace indexing, lazy image loading from disk (no RAM preload), 13MB exe
Tauri: FILENAMECACHE.txt — workspace file index persisted to disk (classic Graal format: relative/path,crc32), no rescan on restart
Tauri: workspace scan streams results progressively via event-based chunks, UI stays responsive during indexing
PeerJS P2P collaboration — real-time multi-user editing with cursor sync, sprite changes, and frame updates
Encrypted or binary .gani files are now rejected with an error on direct load (file picker, drag & drop, reload) — silently ignored when browsing from workspace
Right-clicking a tab shows a context menu — Rename, Close, Close to the Left, Close to the Right (bulk close prompts confirmation)
Sprite selection now uses pixel-accurate hit testing — clicking no longer selects sprites whose bounding box overlaps the cursor but whose actual pixels do not
Workspace browser: clicking a gani now opens it in a new tab instead of importing sprites
Workspace browser: search now uses fuzzy matching — type characters in order, no need for exact match
Open Default dialog no longer shows workspace ganis — only uses the built-in ganis/ list
Tab bar now has scroll buttons when many tabs are open instead of growing taller
Added workspace browser for browsing gani and sound files from the current workspace directory
Workspace loading now loads images in parallel batches — large workspaces load significantly faster
Drag and drop a .gani file anywhere onto the page to open it in a new tab — supports dropping multiple files at once
Fixed canvas blanking out after uploading a gani — canvas now resizes correctly on tab switch
Fixed _sx is not defined crash when drawing sprites without loaded images
Center View no longer resets zoom — only centers pan to grid origin
Zoom buttons and keyboard zoom no longer drift the view — pan is now properly adjusted to keep center anchored
Fixed drag origin indicator — was incorrectly showing after drop instead of during drag
Right-clicking or pressing Escape while dragging a sprite cancels the drag and snaps it back to its origin
Drag origin line and dot scaled up for high-resolution displays
Right-clicking a sprite or on the canvas shows a context menu — Edit Sprite, Copy/Cut/Delete, Paste, Add, Center View
Right-clicking a sprite that is part of a multi-selection preserves the full selection
Pixel grid toggle button added to canvas controls — overlays an alignment grid over the canvas, toggled on/off independently of the character grid
Keybinds moved from About dialog to Settings dialog (Settings | Canvas | Keybinds tabs) — F1 opens About, F2 opens Settings
Settings split into General, Canvas, and Keybinds tabs to reduce scrolling
System fonts loaded via queryLocalFonts() where available — font list now includes installed system fonts
Closing a tab no longer jumps to the wrong animation when the closed tab was to the left of the active one
Defaults button in right panel now shows open/close chevron indicator
Drag selection box color matches the selection border CSS variable — fully themeable
Drag selection box selects and deselects sprites live as you drag, not just on release
About/Info dialog is now a fixed height — switching to Changelog no longer resizes the window
Tab close confirmation now uses the custom styled dialog instead of the browser native popup

Custom CSS variables --canvas-bg, --canvas-grid, --timeline-bg, --preview-bg, --monaco-theme, --timeline-frame-bg/selected/multi, --quadrant-divider for theming canvas, grid, timeline, sprite preview, frame colors, Monaco editor, and split view divider
Monaco editor (VS Code engine) used for Edit Script and Custom CSS dialogs — Graal script syntax highlighting, error checking disabled
Native browser tooltips suppressed — custom styled tooltips now shown exclusively at correct z-index
Custom dropdowns, settings checkboxes, context menus, sprite preview canvas, defaults table, and dialog titlebars now fully themeable via custom CSS
All custom dialogs (Confirm, Alert, Settings, Edit Script, Custom CSS) now have titled headers with contextual icons

Settings dialog: added opacity slider for selection border; selection border color, thickness, and opacity now overridable via --selection-border-color, --selection-border-thickness, --selection-border-opacity CSS vars
Playback controls no longer clipped at bottom
WASD/Arrow swap active state indicator fixed — was incorrectly applied to inner icon element instead of the button
WASD/Arrow swap tooltip updates dynamically to reflect current state
Info dialog tab buttons rounded on top only (straight bottom edge connects flush to content)
Color Effect auto-enables when using the color swatch or RGB inputs
Ctrl+C/X/V to copy/cut/paste selected canvas pieces — changes tracked in undo history
Mirrored Actions button repurposed as Multi Select toggle — click pieces to add to selection without holding Ctrl/Shift
Fixed Lights mode (EFFECTMODE 0) creating visual duplication — now renders as a single-pass additive light effect
Arrow buttons beneath sprite color inputs now have tooltips explaining they cycle through attached sprites in the preview
Zoom slider no longer overwrites X Scale / Y Scale — stored as a separate _zoom multiplier applied at render/save time, preserving independent stretch values
Importing sprites from a .gani file now appears in undo history
Set Working Directory tooltip now explains it loads images from a folder into the editor cache (does not upload to server)
Settings Defaults button now properly resets font/style dropdowns to their default display state
Copy Frame now copies all selected frames when multiple are highlighted — Paste Before/After inserts the full set in order with undo support
Right-click a sprite in the left panel to Edit or Delete it — mimics Graalshop behavior
All context menus (timeline, canvas, sprite list) now use viewport-clamped positioning — no longer go off-screen
Floating tooltip text updates live when button state changes (e.g. WASD/Arrow swap tooltip now refreshes while hovering)
Edit Script dialog now has proper background/border without requiring a custom CSS theme
Dialog titlebar icons now vertically centered with the title text
GScript autocomplete and hover docs in Edit Script — powered by api.gscript.dev, shows function signatures, parameters, scope, return type, and examples
Reset Editor now clears custom CSS in addition to resetting all other settings
Selected sprite now persists when switching frames (matches by piece position, not just sprite type)
Keyboard shortcuts , and . for previous/next frame navigation
Unified info menu combining About, Keybinds, and Changelog into one tabbed dialog (F1 to open)
Item controls centered with padding, layer buttons labeled L+/L-, button gaps increased for easier touch targeting
Timeline zoom via Ctrl+Scroll (desktop) and pinch-to-zoom (mobile)
Custom CSS support via theme menu — import, export, and live-apply your own stylesheet
Multi-frame timeline selection — Shift/Ctrl+click frames then drag to move them as a group
All keybinds now rebindable in the Keybinds tab — covers save, open, undo, redo, play, zoom, deselect, delete, select all, cycle, layers, frames, toggle panels, reset, info dialog
New hotkeys: Ctrl+A select all sprites, [ / ] layer down/up, Shift+Tab adds next sprite to selection
Styled tooltips on all toolbar and playback buttons
EFFECTMODE 2 relabeled from Holes to Blacklight (color inversion / blacklight effect)
Tab close button now shows hover highlight and prompts confirmation before closing
Sprite list icon now reflects scale, rotation, color, and mode modifications
Fixed slider changes (X Scale, Y Scale, Rotation, Zoom) not appearing in undo history
Ctrl+S saves even when an input field is focused
Ctrl+W browser shortcut blocked to prevent accidental tab close
Items dropdown now properly selects the corresponding piece on the canvas
Duration (MS) input arrows now step by 50ms
WASD/Arrow swap button now shows active state indicator
Multi-select sprites in left panel (Ctrl/Shift+click) then drag to place them all at once
Ctrl+click on canvas pieces adds/removes from selection
